title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.8 - Tuned cards now color their damage/block relative to their 'dynamic base' (printed base + the card's own Tuned): a Tuned card reads neutral with no other modifier, red when Weakened, and green when boosted by extra Tuned from other cards or by Strength/Vulnerable.
